decision: Incremental Fuseki sync — track sync state, only PUT deltas on restart. Eliminates 5,800+ file reload on every container start. Root cause of health timeout during fullSyncAll.

steps.action: Incremental Fuseki sync — track sync state only PUT deltas on restart. Eliminates 5 800+ file reload on every container start. Root cause of health timeout during fullSyncAll.
steps.notes: Code shipped: manifest types, load/save, fileChanged detection, fullSync filtering, fullSyncAll lifecycle, FORCE_FULL_SYNC escape hatch. 25/25 tests passing. Kade deployed — health gate confirmed <1s (was 30s+). First full sync running to populate manifest.

Incremental Fuseki sync verified. manifestEntries=13923, changed=1, skipped=13919. Restart sync: 28min→<1s. Health gate confirmed: <1s response during sync. Deploy freeze respected (Silas set at 20:27 UTC, manifest saved 20:35, unfrozen 20:36).
